# Training plan — Asaf (marathon 2027-05-09)

> **Living document.** Asaf sets the *fixed inputs*; his coach (Claude, via the
> mobile Project) owns and evolves everything under **Coach-owned**, adjusting to
> his data, progress, and weak points. The "Current snapshot" is refreshed from
> the training-context feed.

## Goal
Finish the marathon on **2027-05-09** comfortably. Long runway (~44 weeks as of
2026-07-08) → **aerobic base first**, race-specific work later.

## Fixed weekly structure (Asaf)
- **2 strength sessions** — 1 upper body, 1 full body. (Logged from Health Auto
  Export "Traditional Strength Training"; HAE doesn't distinguish upper vs full,
  so Asaf notes which is which.)
- **4 runs** — 1 long, 1 speed, 2 easy.

## Current snapshot  *(auto-updated from the training-context feed)*
- As of **2026-07-08**: ~38 km/week, easy-heavy mix; recent **25 km** long run;
  **ACWR 1.27** (optimal, upper end); projection **~5:15** off a 2:31 half (Jun 14).

## Coach-owned  *(Claude shapes these — do not pre-fill; evolve with the data)*

### Current phase & focus
_TBD with coach. Starting point given the runway: base building — priority is
aerobic volume + steady long-run progression, easy runs kept genuinely easy._

### Targets
- Weekly mileage target: _TBD_
- Long-run progression: _TBD_
- Easy pace / HR ceiling: _TBD_
- Speed-session prescription: _TBD_
- Strength emphasis (support for running weak points): _TBD_

### Identified weak points
_TBD — Claude identifies these from the data (candidates to check: durability /
HR drift late in long runs, speed endurance, hill strength, week-to-week
consistency, recovery between quality days)._

### Adjustment log
